title: Flattened Cow Nose
description: Give cows a legacy flat nose
body:
![Cow with flat nose](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5b6411dc6286360e8b41baebc4162a3f2b16f5c4.png)This pack just give cows a legacy flat nose.
I love new cow variants and those texture but,I also love cow's flat nose in previous versions. So I released this for people like me.
